no: Massive kitpack adding ~45 kits across all classes. Fighter Archer, Paladin Archer, Thief Archer, Stalker/Assassin/Kensai Monks, Shapeshifter Fighter, Sword Dancer, Seducer, Psionicist, War Hulk, Alchemist, Plasma/War/Force/Red Soul/Green Soul Mages, Multiclass Kits, Seer, Flare/Sky Dancer Monks, Witch Doctor Bard, Kuo-toa Disciple, Bog Witch Shaman, Butcher, Poison Druid, Spy Thief. English only. Some components are utility (stat drain, fixpack, race restrictions, summoning limit).

passive.desc: Fighter. Archer: bow specialist with Called Shot.

hlaPool.note: Standard fighter HLA pool (Expanded Classes; some kits have custom HLAs - see passive description).

statBonus.note: +1 hit/dmg with missiles every 3 levels. Grand Mastery in bows/crossbows/darts/slings. Leather/studded/hide armor only. Melee 1 pip max.

passive.desc: Paladin. Archer: bow specialist paladin variant.

hlaPool.note: Standard paladin HLA pool (Expanded Classes; some kits have custom HLAs - see passive description).

spellRestrictions.note: Standard paladin spells. Called Shot scaling like Fighter Archer.

statBonus.note: +1 hit/dmg with missiles every 3 levels. Grand Mastery in bows/crossbows. Leather/studded/hide max. d10 HD.

passive.desc: Thief. Archer: ranged weapon specialist.

hlaPool.note: Standard thief HLA pool (Expanded Classes; some kits have custom HLAs - see passive description).

statBonus.note: +1 hit/dmg missiles every 3 levels. Grand Mastery in shortbows/crossbows/darts/slings. Specialization in daggers. No backstab. 15 skill points/level.

passive.desc: Monk. Stalker: minor backstab with stealth bonuses.

hlaPool.note: Standard monk HLA pool (Expanded Classes; some kits have custom HLAs - see passive description).

statBonus.note: +20% Move Silently and Hide in Shadows. Backstab x2 to lv8, x3 lv9-18, x4 lv19+. d8 HD.

passive.desc: Monk. Assassin: high backstab multiplier, poison weapons.

hlaPool.note: Standard monk HLA pool (Expanded Classes; some kits have custom HLAs - see passive description).

statBonus.note: +1 hit/dmg. Backstab to x6. +0.5 APR every 6 levels. No Lay on Hands. d8 HD. HLAs: Assassination, Power Attack, Critical Strike.

passive.desc: Fighter. Shapeshifter: werewolf form with scaling stat boosts.

hlaPool.note: Standard fighter HLA pool (Expanded Classes; some kits have custom HLAs - see passive description).

statBonus.note: No armor/shields/missiles. Weapons 1 pip max. Loses extra attacks at lv7 and lv13.

passive.desc: Thief. Kensai: Critical Strike instead of Use Any Item.

hlaPool.note: Standard thief HLA pool (Expanded Classes; some kits have custom HLAs - see passive description).

statBonus.note: +2 AC. +1 hit/dmg every 3 levels. -1 SF every 4 levels. No armor/gauntlets/bracers/missiles. 20 skill points/level. No trap-setting. Backstab caps x4. d6 HD.

passive.desc: Monk. Kensai: weapon specialization instead of unarmed.

hlaPool.note: Standard monk HLA pool (Expanded Classes; some kits have custom HLAs - see passive description).

statBonus.note: +2 AC. +1 hit/dmg every 5 levels. -1 SF every 4 levels. Grand Mastery in longswords/short swords/daggers/katanas/scimitars/clubs. No armor/gauntlets/bracers/missiles. No Stunning Blow/Quivering Palm. d8 HD.

passive.desc: Paladin. Kensai: unarmed sword saint variant.

hlaPool.note: Standard paladin HLA pool (Expanded Classes; some kits have custom HLAs - see passive description).

statBonus.note: Kensai package (AC bonus, +hit/dmg, Kai, armor restriction) on paladin chassis. Forum-truncated.

passive.desc: Thief. Sniper: backstab with ranged weapons.

hlaPool.note: Standard thief HLA pool (Expanded Classes; some kits have custom HLAs - see passive description).

statBonus.note: Forum-truncated for full numbers.

passive.desc: Ranger. Wildhaunt: stealth attacks apply fear.

hlaPool.note: Standard ranger HLA pool (Expanded Classes; some kits have custom HLAs - see passive description).

spellRestrictions.note: Standard ranger spells. Fear-themed rider effects on stealth attacks.

statBonus.note: Forum-truncated for mechanical specifics.

passive.desc: Thief. Vampyre: life drain with level drain penalties.

hlaPool.note: Standard thief HLA pool (Expanded Classes; some kits have custom HLAs - see passive description).

statBonus.note: +0.5 attacks at lv7 and lv13. +15% Hide/Move Silently. Level-drain immune. Backstab caps x2. 10 skill points/level. Cannot dual-class.

passive.desc: Fighter. Sword Dancer: triple APR, low damage per hit.

hlaPool.note: Standard fighter HLA pool (Expanded Classes; some kits have custom HLAs - see passive description).

statBonus.note: All physical damage reduced to 1/5. Studded leather max. Mastery cap on light weapons only. d8 HD.

passive.desc: Paladin. Sword Dancer: telekinetic attack multiplication.

hlaPool.note: Standard paladin HLA pool (Expanded Classes; some kits have custom HLAs - see passive description).

statBonus.note: Sword Dancer core (extra attack rolls, reduced dmg, light armor). Forum-truncated for full details.

passive.desc: Thief. Spy: divination-based vulnerability effects.

hlaPool.note: Standard thief HLA pool (Expanded Classes; some kits have custom HLAs - see passive description).

statBonus.note: Forum-truncated for specifics.

passive.desc: Fighter. Psionicist: Mind Blast, Psionic Domination.

hlaPool.note: Standard fighter HLA pool (Expanded Classes; some kits have custom HLAs - see passive description).

statBonus.note: +1 INT. 1-pip weapons only. d6 HD. HLAs include Psionic Shield, Astral Comet, etc.

passive.desc: Monk. Psionicist: mind control abilities.

hlaPool.note: Standard monk HLA pool (Expanded Classes; some kits have custom HLAs - see passive description).

statBonus.note: +1 INT. No Stunning Blow, Lay on Hands, or Quivering Palm. +0.5 APR every 4 levels. No fist enchantment bonuses. d6 HD.

passive.desc: Fighter. War Hulk: single APR, massive damage scaling per hit.

hlaPool.note: Standard fighter HLA pool (Expanded Classes; some kits have custom HLAs - see passive description).

statBonus.note: +1 STR per level through lv5, then +1 THAC0 and +5% melee dmg per level. Locked to 1 APR. No missiles/armor/helmet/shield. 2d8 HD until lv9, 2d6 after.

passive.desc: Mage. Alchemist: potion crafting and poison weapon.

hlaPool.note: Standard mage HLA pool (Expanded Classes; some kits have custom HLAs - see passive description).

spellRestrictions.note: Loses one spell slot/level, -1 casting time, -2 caster level, most mage HLAs. Concoctions (out-of-combat crafting) and Poison Weapon scaling 1d2-1d12.

statBonus.note: Poison-immune. +10% acid and +5% fire resist per level. +1d6 HP/level. +1 save vs death/polymorph every 3 levels. d6 HD.

passive.desc: Mage. Plasma Wizard: custom evocation spells with plasma rod.

hlaPool.note: Standard mage HLA pool (Expanded Classes; some kits have custom HLAs - see passive description).

spellRestrictions.note: One fewer spell slot/level. +15% scribe Invocation, -15% others. +2 save vs Invocation. Crafts Plasma Rod (9 projectile types scaling damage and enchantment).

statBonus.note: d4 HD. HLAs: Spirit of Flame, Aegis of Rime, Scion of Storms, Voice of Entropy.

passive.desc: Sorcerer. Plasma Sorcerer variant.

hlaPool.note: Standard mage HLA pool (Expanded Classes; some kits have custom HLAs - see passive description).

spellRestrictions.note: One fewer spell slot/level. +15% scribe Invocation, -15% others. +2 save vs Invocation. Crafts Plasma Rod (9 projectile types scaling damage and enchantment).

statBonus.note: d4 HD. HLAs: Spirit of Flame, Aegis of Rime, Scion of Storms, Voice of Entropy.

passive.desc: Mage. War Mage: armor/weapon use with reduced spellcasting.

hlaPool.note: Standard mage HLA pool (Expanded Classes; some kits have custom HLAs - see passive description).

spellRestrictions.note: +1 spell slot/level. Can wear any armor and use any weapon. Immune to spell failure. -3 casting time. All spell durations shortened 25%.

statBonus.note: +1 THAC0 every 2 levels. +5% fire resist/level. d8 HD.

passive.desc: Mage. Red Soul: +50% elemental damage, half spell duration.

hlaPool.note: Standard mage HLA pool (Expanded Classes; some kits have custom HLAs - see passive description).

spellRestrictions.note: +50% damage on fire/cold/electricity/acid/poison/magical-damage spells. All spell durations halved.

statBonus.note: +1 CHA, -1 WIS. Cannot be lawful alignment.

passive.desc: Sorcerer. Red Soul variant.

hlaPool.note: Standard sorcerer HLA pool (Expanded Classes; some kits have custom HLAs - see passive description).

spellRestrictions.note: +50% damage on elemental/magic spells. All spell durations halved.

statBonus.note: +1 CHA, -1 WIS. Cannot be lawful alignment.

passive.desc: Mage. Green Soul: +50% spell duration, half spell damage.

hlaPool.note: Standard mage HLA pool (Expanded Classes; some kits have custom HLAs - see passive description).

spellRestrictions.note: All arcane spells last 50% longer but deal half damage. +1 extra spell/level.

statBonus.note: +1 CON, -1 DEX. Cannot be chaotic alignment.

passive.desc: Sorcerer. Green Soul variant.

hlaPool.note: Standard sorcerer HLA pool (Expanded Classes; some kits have custom HLAs - see passive description).

spellRestrictions.note: All arcane spells last 50% longer but deal half damage. +1 extra spell/level.

statBonus.note: +1 CON, -1 DEX. Cannot be chaotic alignment.

passive.desc: Druid. Seer: extrasensory perception abilities.

hlaPool.note: Standard druid HLA pool (Expanded Classes; some kits have custom HLAs - see passive description).

spellRestrictions.note: Same Seer mechanics as cleric variant on druid chassis.

statBonus.note: Same Seer restrictions on druid chassis. d6 HD.

passive.desc: Cleric. Seer: divination/insight bonuses.

hlaPool.note: Standard cleric HLA pool (Expanded Classes; some kits have custom HLAs - see passive description).

spellRestrictions.note: +3 Lore/level. Loses one spell/day/level. Innate Identify, Share Insight, Dissociation, True Seeing, Secret Word, Foresight, Call Seer's Voice. Immune to beneficial illusions.

statBonus.note: Immune to blindness and hostile illusions. Sees invisible. Supernatural Insight (+1 AC/THAC0 scaling). No armor/helmet/shield. Cannot dual-class. d6 HD.

passive.desc: Mage. Force Wizard: melee wizard with strong unarmed attacks.

hlaPool.note: Standard mage HLA pool (Expanded Classes; some kits have custom HLAs - see passive description).

spellRestrictions.note: Melee-oriented wizard with enhanced unarmed attacks. Forum-truncated for specifics.

statBonus.note: Force damage scaling. Forum-truncated.

passive.desc: Fighter. Executioner: specializes in one-hit kills.

hlaPool.note: Standard fighter HLA pool (Expanded Classes; some kits have custom HLAs - see passive description).

statBonus.note: Forum-truncated; mechanical details limited.

passive.desc: Monk. Flare Dancer: triple attacks with fire damage.

hlaPool.note: Standard monk HLA pool (Expanded Classes; some kits have custom HLAs - see passive description).

statBonus.note: +1 DEX. Two extra attack rolls/attack. +1 fire dmg per unarmed strike. +5% fire resist per level. Damage reduced to 1/5. No Stunning Blow/Lay on Hands/Quivering Palm. MR scaling drops to 2%/level after lv14. d6 HD.

passive.desc: Monk. Sky Dancer: triple attacks with lightning, teleportation.

hlaPool.note: Standard monk HLA pool (Expanded Classes; some kits have custom HLAs - see passive description).

statBonus.note: +1 DEX. Two extra attack rolls/attack. +5% electricity resist per level. Damage reduced to 1/5. No Stunning Blow/Lay on Hands/Quivering Palm. d6 HD.

passive.desc: Bard. Primordial Witch Doctor: 40+ neolithic custom spells.

hlaPool.note: Standard bard HLA pool (Expanded Classes; some kits have custom HLAs - see passive description).

spellRestrictions.note: Neolithic-themed support bard with ~40 custom spells.

statBonus.note: Forum-truncated for full song/spell details.

passive.desc: Bard. Kuo-toa Disciple: kuo-toa themed bonuses.

hlaPool.note: Standard bard HLA pool (Expanded Classes; some kits have custom HLAs - see passive description).

spellRestrictions.note: Weakened spellcasting with kuo-toa themed bonuses. Psionic song replaces standard bard song.

statBonus.note: Forum-truncated for specifics.

passive.desc: Shaman. Bog Witch: summons shadow monsters at HP cost.

hlaPool.note: Standard shaman HLA pool (Expanded Classes; some kits have custom HLAs - see passive description).

spellRestrictions.note: Swamp/bog-themed shaman. Summons shadow monsters at HP cost.

statBonus.note: Forum-truncated for full mechanics.

passive.desc: Fighter. Butcher: bonuses from consecutive hits.

hlaPool.note: Standard fighter HLA pool (Expanded Classes; some kits have custom HLAs - see passive description).

statBonus.note: Forum-truncated; mechanical details limited.

passive.desc: Druid. Poison Druid: 14 poison-themed custom spells.

hlaPool.note: Standard druid HLA pool (Expanded Classes; some kits have custom HLAs - see passive description).

spellRestrictions.note: Cannot cast normal druid spells; replaces with custom poison-themed spell list (~14 spells).

statBonus.note: Forum-truncated for specifics.

passive.desc: Thief. Nightmare: fear spells bypassing immunities.

hlaPool.note: Standard thief HLA pool (Expanded Classes; some kits have custom HLAs - see passive description).

statBonus.note: Forum-truncated for scaling.

sum: Large kitpack adding ~45 kits across all classes including archer variants, wizard specialists, and class overhauls.
